title: Doubting Castle
subtitle: When forgotten promises become the way out
intro: You wake on cold stone with iron before you and Giant Despair pacing like a verdict overhead.
In this place, memory turns against you. The locked door looks final, and every promise feels like something you once imagined.
Search again. The key called Promise was never outside mercy's reach; it has been near your heart all along.
spiritual_theme: Remembering grace when despair edits the truth
core_mechanic: Endure Giant Despair's pressure, search the cell or your own breast pocket for Promise, and unlock the door before hopelessness becomes home.

design.provenance: Attachment Ch13 疑惑堡与绝望巨人 + promise-key system (Skills 41-42). Boss = GiantDespair.gd.

seven_beats.arrival: Weary on the rough true road, travelling with Hopeful.
seven_beats.orientation: A soft meadow looks easier than the hard road; a small warning cross stands at the fork.
seven_beats.encounter: You stray into the meadow; a storm loses the road; Giant Despair seizes you into Doubting Castle.
seven_beats.temptation: Despair editing the truth in the cell — Darkthought whispers your past failures back at you.
seven_beats.choice: Listen to the accusations / let Hopeful encourage you / remember the Promise.
seven_beats.consequence: The cell raises despair and shame the longer you stay; Hopeful's word lifts hope.
seven_beats.grace: Remember the key of Promise in your own breast, unlock the door, escape — and leave a warning for others.

cross_markers: a cross scratched on the cell wall
a dawn cross at the escape gate

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 你已经走偏了；若你真有信心，怎会被关在这里？

design.stat_arc_note: Entry spikes despair / drains hope; the Promise (has_promise_key) reverses it. No chapel — only faint crosses, by design.
design.kept_original: No formal chapel, matching the attachment — despair must be answered by the remembered Promise, not a save room.
